name: Merry Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Rainbow Morsels, divided (9 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, baking powder and salt; set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and sugar until creamy. Blend in egg and vanilla extract. Gradually beat in flour mixture. (Batter will be stiff.)
Stir in 1 cup Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Rainbow Morsels. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into balls; place on ungreased cookie sheets.
Gently press 3 of the remaining Rainbow Morsels into each ball. Bake for 8-10 minutes until edges are lightly browned. Let stand for 2 minutes.
Remove from cookie sheets and cool.
Makes about 4 1/2 dozen cookies.
